subcodes.first_line: The Book sent down by the Sovereign of Eternity, Who hath manifested Himself through His Most Great Name, unto him who hath turned towards God, the All-Subduing [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب انزله مالک القدم الذی ظهر باسمه الاعظم الی الذی اقبل الی الله المهیمن
